meeting_summary: A product demo of TaskMaster Pro was conducted for ABC Company. The software's task management, file attachment, reporting, and reminder features were discussed. Pricing, a trial period, and support options were negotiated. Action items were assigned for follow-up.

agenda_items.discussion: David presented the software's capabilities for task creation, assignment, deadlines, file attachments (up to 100MB), and automatic reporting (PDF emailed weekly). Sarah confirmed the need for these features to replace their current email and Excel system.

The Basic plan ($100/month for 20 users) and Pro plan ($150/month with SMS and advanced reports) were discussed. A discounted first-month Pro plan offer of $120 was made, contingent on a decision within two weeks. A final price of $150 for the Pro plan including phone support was agreed upon.
agenda_items.decision: Agreed on a final Pro plan price of $150/month including phone support, pending internal approval.

agenda_items.discussion: A standard 7-day trial for 10 users was offered. David extended the trial to 10 days for ABC Company's 15 people.
Email support is free; SMS reminders and phone support cost extra. Free training videos are available, with live training costing $200. Sarah confirmed video training is sufficient for now.
agenda_items.decision: ABC Company will use the free training videos.

decisions: Proceed with a 10-day trial of TaskMaster Pro
The final Pro plan price, if adopted, will be $150/month including phone support

action_items.task: Send trial access, pricing, and phone support details
Test the software with the team

open_points: Internal approval from Sarah's boss on the Pro plan purchase
